notes:
I've created a new design system and four core screens for your Cargo-inspired studio portfolio. 

The **Project Directory** is the heart of the site, showcasing work through a minimal grid and service filters. The **Works Index** provides a more structured, list-based view of the studio's entire history, while the **Case Study** for 'Vanguard Records' shows how to present a project with a calm, immersive flow. I've also included a **Studio Info** page that balances atmospheric photography with a clean, typographic 'About' section and services list. 

The entire site is unified by a restrained, premium aesthetic that prioritizes high-quality typography and strategic negative space.

Would you like to adjust any of the layouts or explore a different color palette?
prompt: Design a Cargo-inspired studio portfolio template with a selected project directory, service filters, structured lists, restrained premium type, and a calm case-study path.
suggestions: Add a 'Services' page in a three-column grid
Change the color scheme to a darker, midnight-blue palette
Update the project directory with masonry-style thumbnails
title: Project Directory
